name_cn:
Premium Exclusive🔥 Grey/Antique Gold
▪ROSE▪️ Autumn/Winter New, Korean Celebrity Style Hobo!! This year's exploding hot shoulder bag Y's arrival!! The bag body has a simple, three-dimensional outline, looking structured but not too sharp. Paired with the brand's signature insert buckle, it gives a unique temperament that is both classic and elegant, yet very fashionable and modern👍
Model: 713938【Original Leather】
Size: 22x22x10cm
